fields.title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Headphones
fields.description: Excellent condition, midnight blue color. Includes original carrying case, USB-C charging cable, and 3.5mm audio jack. Battery life still lasts up to 30 hours. Active Noise Cancelling works perfectly.

fields.title: iPad Air (4th Generation) - 64GB Wi-Fi
fields.description: Space Gray, pristine condition with no scratches. Screen protector applied since day one. Comes with the original box and a generic magnetic folio case.
fields.desired_offer: Looking to exchange for a comparable Windows laptop (e.g., ThinkPad or Dell XPS) for coding.

fields.title: Mechanical Keyboard (Keychron K2 V2)
fields.description: RGB backlight with Gateron Brown tactile switches. Aluminum frame, Mac/Windows compatible. Lightly used for two months, thoroughly cleaned.
fields.desired_offer: Will trade for an Apple Magic Trackpad 2 in black or white.

fields.title: Samsung 27" CRG5 Curved Gaming Monitor
fields.description: 240Hz refresh rate, 4ms response time, 1080p resolution. G-Sync compatible. Perfect for competitive gaming. No dead pixels. Moving out of town and need it gone.

fields.title: Fujifilm X-T30 Mirrorless Camera (Body Only)
fields.description: 26.1MP APS-C sensor, black body. Minor cosmetic wear on the bottom plate, but mechanically and optically perfect. Includes two batteries and a dual charger.
fields.desired_offer: Open to exchanging for a DJI Mini 3 Pro or Mini 4 Pro drone setup.

fields.title: Nintendo Switch OLED Model (White
fields.description: Brand new, factory sealed in box. Includes dock, Joy-Cons, grip, and cables. Received as a gift but I already own one.
fields.desired_offer: Would love to trade for a PlayStation 5 Slim (Digital or Disc edition), willing to add cash on top if necessary.

fields.title: iPhone 13 Pro (128GB, Graphite)
fields.description: Excellent condition, always kept in a case. Battery health is at 88%. Includes original box and charging cable.
fields.desired_offer: Looking for a high-end Android tablet or iPad Air.

fields.title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Headphones
fields.description: Silver color, lightly used for a few flights. Comes with the carrying case and airline adapter.

fields.title: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Jeans (32x30)
fields.description: Dark wash, brand new with tags. Ordered the wrong size online and missed the return window.
fields.desired_offer: Open to trading for the same pair in 33x30, or a cool denim jacket.

fields.title: Patagonia Better Sweater Fleece (Medium)
fields.description: Oatmeal color, worn a handful of times. No pilling, excellent condition.

fields.title: Dune by Frank Herbert (Deluxe Hardcover)
fields.description: Beautiful collector's edition with stained edges. Read once, spine is perfectly intact.
fields.desired_offer: Want to trade for other sci-fi hardcovers, specifically looking for Hyperion Cantos.

fields.title: Atomic Habits by James Clear
fields.description: Paperback copy. Minor highlighting on the first two chapters, otherwise clean.

fields.title: Mechanical Keyboard (Keychron K2)
fields.description: Gateron Brown switches, RGB backlight. Wireless Bluetooth connection. Works great with Mac and Windows.
fields.desired_offer: Looking for a logitech MX Master 3S mouse.

fields.title: Kindle Paperwhite (11th Gen)
fields.description: 8GB version with lockscreen ads. Waterproof, perfect for reading by the pool. Box included.

fields.title: Nike Air Max 90 (Size 10)
fields.description: Infrared colorway. Worn twice outdoors, virtually no wear on the soles.
fields.desired_offer: Interested in Adidas Ultraboosts in the same size.

fields.title: Carhartt WIP Beanie (Black)
fields.description: One size fits all. Never worn, tag is still attached.

fields.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow by Daniel Kahneman
fields.description: Softcover edition. Good condition with some creasing on the spine.
fields.desired_offer: Any interesting books on behavioral economics or psychology.

fields.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
fields.description: Yuval Noah Harari bestseller. Clean pages, no dog-ears.

fields.title: GoPro Hero 10 Black
fields.description: Comes with two batteries, a dual charger, and a protective carrying case. Mint condition.

fields.title: Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K)
fields.description: 140W fast charging portable charger. Has an smart digital display. Light surface scratches.
fields.desired_offer: Smaller 10,000mAh power bank plus some cash.

fields.title: North Face McMurdo Parka (Large)
fields.description: Heavy-duty winter coat, down-filled and waterproof. Kept me warm through two heavy winters.

fields.title: Champion Reverse Weave Hoodie (XL)
fields.description: Classic grey hoodie. Heavyweight cotton, slightly oversized fit.
fields.desired_offer: A similar heavyweight hoodie in size Large.

fields.title: Project Hail Mary by Andy Weir
fields.description: Hardcover first edition. Incredible sci-fi read, perfect shape.

fields.title: The Silent Patient by Alex Michaelides
fields.description: Psychological thriller paperback. Read once on vacation.
fields.desired_offer: Any other mystery/thriller fiction novels.

fields.title: iPad Mini 6 (64GB, Wi-Fi, Space Gray)
fields.description: Used mainly for reading sheet music. Screen protector applied on day one. Flawless.
fields.desired_offer: Would love to trade for a standard 10.9-inch iPad or an entry-level laptop.

fields.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight Mouse
fields.description: Ultra-lightweight gaming mouse. White color. Extra PTFE mouse skates included in the box.

fields.title: Dr. Martens 1460 Smooth Leather Boots (Size 9)
fields.description: Black 8-eyelet classic boots. Only worn to break them in, but they're slightly too tight for me.
fields.desired_offer: Same boots in size 10, or upscale leather loafers.

fields.title: Uniqlo Oversized Airism Tee (Medium, Olive)
fields.description: Brand new, still packaged. Bought multiple colors and decided I don't need this shade.

fields.title: The Hobbit & Lord of the Rings Box Set
fields.description: 4-volume paperback pocket edition box set. Leatherette covers. Looks beautiful on a shelf.
fields.desired_offer: A comprehensive fantasy world map or graphic novels.

fields.title: Educated by Tara Westover
fields.description: Hardcover memoir. Compelling story, condition is practically new.

fields.title: Razer BlackShark V2 Pro Wireless Headset
fields.description: Premium esports gaming headset. Detachable mic, excellent noise isolation. Box and wireless dongle present.

fields.title: Blue Yeti USB Microphone (Blackout Edition)
fields.description: Perfect for streaming, podcasting, or Zoom calls. Includes desktop stand and USB cable.
fields.desired_offer: A compact audio interface (Focusrite Scarlett Solo or similar).

fields.title: Adidas Tiro 21 Track Pants (Small)
fields.description: Classic black with white stripes. Slim fit, breathable athletic fabric. Gently used.

fields.title: Zara Faux Leather Jacket (Medium)
fields.description: Biker style jacket. Fits quite slim. Looks great, only worn a few times for nights out.
fields.desired_offer: A bomber jacket or utility jacket in Medium.

fields.title: The Alchemist by Paulo Coelho
fields.description: Anniversary paperback edition. Inspiring read, excellent condition.

fields.title: Grit: The Power of Passion and Perseverance
fields.description: Angela Duckworth hardcover. Highly influential psychology book.
fields.desired_offer: Self-development books (e.g., Deep Work, Essentialism).

fields.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 5 (44mm, Bluetooth)
fields.description: Graphite body with black sport band. Comes with magnetic puck charger. Small bezel scuff.
fields.desired_offer: Trade for an equivalent Fitbit or Garmin running watch.

fields.title: Fujifilm Instax Mini 11 (Sky Blue)
fields.description: Instant film camera. Fun for parties. Includes hand strap. Note: does NOT include film packs.

fields.title: Ray-Ban Classic Wayfarer Sunglasses
fields.description: Black acetate frames, G-15 green lenses. Fits medium-sized faces. Carrying case included.
fields.desired_offer: Clubmaster style sunglasses or premium polarized eyewear.

fields.title: Gymshark Arrival Shorts (Large, Pack of 2)
fields.description: One black, one navy blue. 7-inch inseam, lightweight material without liners.

fields.title: Babel by R.F. Kuang
fields.description: Hardcover dark academia speculative historical fiction. Minor shelf wear on dust jacket.

fields.title: Zero to One by Peter Thiel
fields.description: Hardcover notes on startups and how to build the future. Clean pages.
fields.desired_offer: The Lean Startup by Eric Ries.

fields.title: Apple Magic Trackpad (White)
fields.description: Rechargeable wireless desktop multi-touch surface. Pairs instantly via Bluetooth. Barely used.
fields.desired_offer: Apple Magic Mouse 2.

fields.title: Razer Seiren Mini Condenser Mic
fields.description: Ultra-compact streaming microphone. Mercury White edition. Great clarity for gaming comms.

fields.title: Arc'teryx Word Head Toque (Beanie)
fields.description: Reversible wool/acrylic blend beanie. Crimson/Burgundy colorway. Very warm.
fields.desired_offer: Any beanie from Ganni or Acne Studios.

fields.title: Dickies 874 Original Work Pants (30x32)
fields.description: Khaki color, stiff durable twill fabric. Classic skate/streetwear essential.

fields.title: The Creative Act: A Way of Being by Rick Rubin
fields.description: Beautiful cloth-bound hardcover edition. Great philosophical thoughts on the creative process.
fields.desired_offer: Art coffee table books or musical biographies.

fields.title: Meditations by Marcus Aurelius
fields.description: Gregory Hays translation (the best modern translation). Paperback copy in solid condition.
